evidence: Authenticated read of full balance + credits/debits + transactions; account IDs sequential (jsmith=800002,800003). No object-ownership check apparent in spec.

evidence: Same sequential-id endpoint exposes per-account transaction history.
chain_potential: full transaction history of arbitrary customers

evidence: Admin endpoint published in public swagger; reachability by a low-priv (jsmith) token unverified.

evidence: Admin password-change endpoint in public swagger; authz unverified.
chain_potential: reset arbitrary user password -> account takeover

evidence: Classic AltoroMutual login; username reflected into token. SQLi auth-bypass historically present.

evidence: content= loads .htm templates from disk; classic path-traversal/LFI shape.
